data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Created plugins/dso/scripts/suggestion-record.sh (flock-based, uses _flock_stage_commit from ticket-lib.sh), plugins/dso/docs/contracts/suggestion-schema-contract.md, and tests/scripts/test-suggestion-record.sh. Shim routing already works (dso dispatches to DSO_ROOT/scripts/$CMD). Ticket list/health exclusion is handled naturally since .suggestions/ starts with '.' (reducer skips hidden dirs).
